basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Research Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website https://nitw.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Mathematics/Biomechanics/Biomedical Engineering or related discipline, Minimum 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA (GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL) / 55% or 6.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD) at UG and PG, At least two research papers in SCI journals
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Mathematics/Biomechanics/Biomedical Engineering or related discipline (candidates who have submitted thesis also eligible). Minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA (GEN/OBC) / 55% or 6.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD) at UG and PG. At least two SCI journal papers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_waranga: Ph.D. in Mathematics/Biomechanics/Biomedical Engineering or related discipline, Minimum 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA (GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL) / 55% or 6.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD) at UG and PG, At least two research papers in SCI journals

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Warangal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Mathematics/Biomechanics/Biomedical Engineering or related discipline (candidates who have submitted thesis also eligible). Minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA (GEN/OBC) / 55% or 6.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD) at UG and PG. At least two SCI journal papers.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Female candidates.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate - I position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Mathematics, Biomechanics, Biomedical Engineering, or a related discipline. Additionally, a minimum of 60% or 6.5 CGPA at UG and PG levels is required, along with at least two SCI journal publications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate - I position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 58,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate - I position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate - I in this recruitment drive by NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q8. When will the interview for the shortlisted candidates be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be held on 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Research Associate - I is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.
